Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Sets.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.PartA.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope mor_disp_scope.

(** ** Isomorphisms (and lemmas) *)

Section Isos.

  Definition is_disp_inverse {C : precategory} {D : disp_cat_data C} {x y : C}
    {f : x --> y} {g: y --> x} (isinv: is_inverse_in_precat f g)
    {xx : D x} {yy : D y} (ff : xx -->[f] yy) (gg : yy -->[g] xx) : UU
    := gg ;; ff = transportb _ (pr2 isinv) (id_disp yy) ×
                    ff ;; gg = transportb _ (pr1 isinv) (id_disp xx).

  Definition is_z_iso_disp {C : precategory} {D : disp_cat_data C}
             {x y : C} (f : z_iso x y) {xx : D x} {yy} (ff : xx -->[f] yy) : UU
    := ∑ (gg : yy -->[inv_from_z_iso f] xx),
      is_disp_inverse (z_iso_is_inverse_in_precat f) ff gg.

  Definition z_iso_disp {C : precategory} {D : disp_cat_data C}
             {x y : C} (f : z_iso x y) (xx : D x) (yy : D y)
    := ∑ ff : xx -->[f] yy, is_z_iso_disp f ff.

  Definition make_z_iso_disp {C : precategory} {D : disp_cat_data C}
             {x y : C} {f : z_iso x y} {xx : D x} {yy : D y}
             (ff : xx -->[f] yy) (is : is_z_iso_disp f ff)
    : z_iso_disp _ _ _
    := (ff,, is).

  Definition mor_disp_from_z_iso {C : precategory} {D : disp_cat_data C}
             {x y : C} {f : z_iso x y}{xx : D x} {yy : D y}
             (i : z_iso_disp f xx yy) : _ -->[ _ ] _ := pr1 i.
  Coercion mor_disp_from_z_iso : z_iso_disp >-> mor_disp.

  Definition is_z_iso_disp_from_z_iso {C : precategory} {D : disp_cat_data C}
             {x y : C} {f : z_iso x y}{xx : D x} {yy : D y}
             (i : z_iso_disp f xx yy) : is_z_iso_disp f i := pr2 i.
  Coercion is_z_iso_disp_from_z_iso : z_iso_disp >-> is_z_iso_disp.

  Definition inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso {C : precategory} {D : disp_cat_data C}
             {x y : C} {f : z_iso x y}{xx : D x} {yy : D y}
             {ff : xx -->[f] yy} (i : is_z_iso_disp f ff)
    : _ -->[ _ ] _ := pr1 i.

  
C: precategory
D: disp_cat_data C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
i: is_z_iso_disp f ff
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso i ;; ff =
transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv f)
  (id_disp yy)

  
C: precategory
D: disp_cat_data C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
i: is_z_iso_disp f ff
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso i ;; ff =
transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv f)
  (id_disp yy)

    apply (pr2 i).
  Qed.

  
C: precategory
D: disp_cat_data C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
i: is_z_iso_disp f ff
ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso i =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso f)
  (id_disp xx)

  
C: precategory
D: disp_cat_data C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
i: is_z_iso_disp f ff
ff ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso i =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso f)
  (id_disp xx)

    apply (pr2 (pr2 i)).
  Qed.


  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
isinv: is_inverse_in_precat f g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] xx
isaprop (is_disp_inverse isinv ff gg)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
isinv: is_inverse_in_precat f g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] xx
isaprop (is_disp_inverse isinv ff gg)

    apply isapropdirprod; apply homsets_disp.
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
isaprop (is_z_iso_disp f ff)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
isaprop (is_z_iso_disp f ff)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
i, i': is_z_iso_disp f ff
i = i'

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
i, i': is_z_iso_disp f ff
isPredicate (is_disp_inverse f ff)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
i, i': is_z_iso_disp f ff
pr1 i = pr1 i'

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
i, i': is_z_iso_disp f ff
isPredicate (is_disp_inverse f ff)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
i, i': is_z_iso_disp f ff
gg: yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx
isaprop (is_disp_inverse f ff gg)
 apply isaprop_is_disp_inverse.
    (* uniqueness of inverses *)
    (* TODO: think about better lemmas for this sort of calculation?
  e.g. all that repeated application of [transport_f_f], etc. *)
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
i, i': is_z_iso_disp f ff
pr1 i = pr1 i'
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx
gf: gg ;; ff =
transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 f) (id_disp yy)
fg: ff ;; gg =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
gg': yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx
gf': gg' ;; ff = transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 f) (id_disp yy)
fg': ff ;; gg' = transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
gg = gg'

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx
gf: gg ;; ff =
transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 f) (id_disp yy)
fg: ff ;; gg =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
gg': yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx
gf': gg' ;; ff = transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 f) (id_disp yy)
fg': ff ;; gg' = transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
gg = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx
gf: gg ;; ff =
transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 f) (id_disp yy)
fg: ff ;; gg =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
gg': yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx
gf': gg' ;; ff = transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 f) (id_disp yy)
fg': ff ;; gg' = transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
?b = gg'
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx
gf: gg ;; ff =
transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 f) (id_disp yy)
fg: ff ;; gg =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
gg': yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx
gf': gg' ;; ff = transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 f) (id_disp yy)
fg': ff ;; gg' = transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
transportf (mor_disp yy xx) ?e
  (transportb (mor_disp yy xx) ?e gg) = gg'

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx
gf: gg ;; ff =
transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 f) (id_disp yy)
fg: ff ;; gg =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
gg': yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx
gf': gg' ;; ff = transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 f) (id_disp yy)
fg': ff ;; gg' = transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
transportf (mor_disp yy xx) ?e
  (transportb (mor_disp yy xx) ?e gg) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx
gf: gg ;; ff =
transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 f) (id_disp yy)
fg: ff ;; gg =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
gg': yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx
gf': gg' ;; ff = transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 f) (id_disp yy)
fg': ff ;; gg' = transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
?b = gg'
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx
gf: gg ;; ff =
transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 f) (id_disp yy)
fg: ff ;; gg =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
gg': yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx
gf': gg' ;; ff = transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 f) (id_disp yy)
fg': ff ;; gg' = transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
transportf (mor_disp yy xx)
  (id_right (inv_from_z_iso f)) (gg ;; id_disp xx) =
gg'

D: disp_cat C

id_disp xx = ?t2

transportf (mor_disp yy xx)
  (id_right (inv_from_z_iso f)) (gg ;; ?t2) = gg'

fg': ff ;; gg' = transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
id_disp xx = ?b

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx
gf: gg ;; ff =
transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 f) (id_disp yy)
fg: ff ;; gg =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
gg': yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx
gf': gg' ;; ff = transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 f) (id_disp yy)
fg': ff ;; gg' = transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
transportf (mor_disp xx xx) ?e
  (transportb (mor_disp xx xx) ?e (id_disp xx)) = 
?t2

D: disp_cat C

D: disp_cat C

  (id_right (inv_from_z_iso f))
  (gg ;; transportf (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f)
           (ff ;; gg')) = gg'

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx
gf: gg ;; ff =
transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 f) (id_disp yy)
fg: ff ;; gg =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
gg': yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx
gf': gg' ;; ff = transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 f) (id_disp yy)
fg': ff ;; gg' = transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
?b = gg'
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx
gf: gg ;; ff =
transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 f) (id_disp yy)
fg: ff ;; gg =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
gg': yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx
gf': gg' ;; ff = transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 f) (id_disp yy)
fg': ff ;; gg' = transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
transportf (mor_disp yy xx)
  (id_right (inv_from_z_iso f))
  (transportf (mor_disp yy xx)
     (maponpaths (compose (inv_from_z_iso f)) (pr1 f))
     (gg ;; (ff ;; gg'))) = gg'

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C

f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy

gf: gg ;; ff =

gg': yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx

fg': ff ;; gg' = transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
transportf (mor_disp yy xx)
  (id_right (inv_from_z_iso f))
  (transportf (mor_disp yy xx)
     (maponpaths (compose (inv_from_z_iso f)) (pr1 f))
     (gg ;; (ff ;; gg'))) = ?b

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx
gf: gg ;; ff =
transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 f) (id_disp yy)

transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
gg': yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx
gf': gg' ;; ff = transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 f) (id_disp yy)
fg': ff ;; gg' = transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
transportf (mor_disp yy xx)
  (maponpaths (compose (inv_from_z_iso f)) (pr1 f) @
   id_right (inv_from_z_iso f)) (gg ;; (ff ;; gg')) =
gg'

fg: ff ;; gg =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)

  (maponpaths (compose (inv_from_z_iso f)) (pr1 f) @

     (assoc (inv_from_z_iso f) f (inv_from_z_iso f))

gf: gg ;; ff =

fg: ff ;; gg =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
gg': yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx
gf: gg ;; ff =
transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 f) (id_disp yy)
fg: ff ;; gg =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
gg': yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx
gf': gg' ;; ff = transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 f) (id_disp yy)
fg': ff ;; gg' = transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
transportf (mor_disp yy xx)
  (! assoc (inv_from_z_iso f) f (inv_from_z_iso f) @
   maponpaths (compose (inv_from_z_iso f)) (pr1 f) @
   id_right (inv_from_z_iso f))
  (transportf (mor_disp yy xx)
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity y)
        (inv_from_z_iso f · f) (inv_from_z_iso f)
        (! pr2 f)) (id_disp yy ;; gg')) = gg'

  (transportf (mor_disp yy xx)

   maponpaths (compose (inv_from_z_iso f)) (pr1 f) @
   id_right (inv_from_z_iso f))
  (transportb (mor_disp yy xx)
     (id_left (inv_from_z_iso f)) gg') = gg'

D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y

yy: pr1 D y

fg: ff ;; gg =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
gg': yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx

fg': ff ;; gg' = transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)

  (cancel_postcomposition (identity y)
     (inv_from_z_iso f · f) (inv_from_z_iso f)
     (! pr2 f) @
   ! assoc (inv_from_z_iso f) f (inv_from_z_iso f) @
   maponpaths (compose (inv_from_z_iso f)) (pr1 f) @

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx
gf: gg ;; ff =
transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 f) (id_disp yy)
fg: ff ;; gg =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
gg': yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx
gf': gg' ;; ff = transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 f) (id_disp yy)
fg': ff ;; gg' = transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
?b = gg'
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx
gf: gg ;; ff =
transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 f) (id_disp yy)
fg: ff ;; gg =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
gg': yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx
gf': gg' ;; ff = transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 f) (id_disp yy)
fg': ff ;; gg' = transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
transportf (mor_disp yy xx)
  (! id_left (inv_from_z_iso f) @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity y)
     (inv_from_z_iso f · f) (inv_from_z_iso f)
     (! pr2 f) @
   ! assoc (inv_from_z_iso f) f (inv_from_z_iso f) @
   maponpaths (compose (inv_from_z_iso f)) (pr1 f) @
   id_right (inv_from_z_iso f)) gg' = gg'

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx
gf: gg ;; ff =
transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 f) (id_disp yy)
fg: ff ;; gg =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
gg': yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f] xx
gf': gg' ;; ff = transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 f) (id_disp yy)
fg': ff ;; gg' = transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx)
! id_left (inv_from_z_iso f) @
cancel_postcomposition (identity y)
  (inv_from_z_iso f · f) (inv_from_z_iso f) (! pr2 f) @
! assoc (inv_from_z_iso f) f (inv_from_z_iso f) @
maponpaths (compose (inv_from_z_iso f)) (pr1 f) @
id_right (inv_from_z_iso f) =
idpath (inv_from_z_iso f)

      apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
isaset (z_iso_disp f xx yy)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
isaset (z_iso_disp f xx yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
isaset (xx -->[ f] yy)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
∏ x0 : xx -->[ f] yy, isaset (is_z_iso_disp f x0)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
isaset (xx -->[ f] yy)
 apply homsets_disp.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
∏ x0 : xx -->[ f] yy, isaset (is_z_iso_disp f x0)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
x0: xx -->[ f] yy
isaset (is_z_iso_disp f x0)
 apply isasetaprop, isaprop_is_z_iso_disp.
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff, ff': z_iso_disp f xx yy
pr1 ff = pr1 ff' → ff = ff'

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff, ff': z_iso_disp f xx yy
pr1 ff = pr1 ff' → ff = ff'

    apply subtypePath; intro; apply isaprop_is_z_iso_disp.
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, f': z_iso x y
e: f = f'
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
is: is_z_iso_disp f ff
is_z_iso_disp f'
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (maponpaths z_iso_mor e) ff)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, f': z_iso x y
e: f = f'
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
is: is_z_iso_disp f ff
is_z_iso_disp f'
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (maponpaths z_iso_mor e) ff)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
is: is_z_iso_disp f ff
is_z_iso_disp f
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (maponpaths z_iso_mor (idpath f)) ff)

    apply is.
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, f': z_iso x y
e: f = f'
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
pr1
  (transportf (λ g : z_iso x y, z_iso_disp g xx yy) e
     ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (maponpaths pr1 e)
  (pr1 ff)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, f': z_iso x y
e: f = f'
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
pr1
  (transportf (λ g : z_iso x y, z_iso_disp g xx yy) e
     ff) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (maponpaths pr1 e)
  (pr1 ff)

    destruct e; apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat_data C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
i: z_iso_disp f xx yy
is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f)
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso i)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat_data C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
i: z_iso_disp f xx yy
is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f)
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso i)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat_data C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
i: z_iso_disp f xx yy
xx -->[ inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f)] yy
C: category
D: disp_cat_data C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
i: z_iso_disp f xx yy
(λ gg : xx -->[
        inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f)] yy,
 is_disp_inverse (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f)
   (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso i) gg) ?pr1

    
C: category
D: disp_cat_data C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
i: z_iso_disp f xx yy
xx -->[ inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f)] yy
 
C: category
D: disp_cat_data C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
i: z_iso_disp f xx yy
xx -->[
z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f)] yy

      
C: category
D: disp_cat_data C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
i: z_iso_disp f xx yy
XR:= transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (maponpaths pr1 (z_iso_inv_z_iso_inv x y f)): xx -->[ pr1 f] yy
→ xx -->[
  pr1
    (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
       (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f))] yy
xx -->[
z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f)] yy

      
C: category
D: disp_cat_data C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
i: z_iso_disp f xx yy
XR:= transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (maponpaths pr1 (z_iso_inv_z_iso_inv x y f)): xx -->[ pr1 f] yy
→ xx -->[
  pr1
    (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
       (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f))] yy
xx -->[ pr1 f] yy
 apply i.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat_data C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
i: z_iso_disp f xx yy
(λ gg : xx -->[
        inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f)] yy,
 is_disp_inverse (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f)
   (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso i) gg)
  (let XR :=
     transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
       (maponpaths pr1 (z_iso_inv_z_iso_inv x y f)) in
   XR (let X := pr1 i in X))
 
C: category
D: disp_cat_data C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
i: z_iso_disp f xx yy
is_disp_inverse (is_inverse_in_precat_inv f)
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso i)
  (transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
     (maponpaths pr1 (z_iso_inv_z_iso_inv x y f))
     (pr1 i))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat_data C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
i: z_iso_disp f xx yy
transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (maponpaths pr1 (z_iso_inv_z_iso_inv x y f)) (pr1 i) ;; 
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso i =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx)
  (pr2 (is_inverse_in_precat_inv f)) (id_disp xx)
C: category
D: disp_cat_data C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
i: z_iso_disp f xx yy
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso i ;; transportb
                               (mor_disp xx yy)
                               (maponpaths pr1
                                  (z_iso_inv_z_iso_inv
                                     x y f)) (pr1 i) =
transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (pr1 (is_inverse_in_precat_inv f)) (id_disp yy)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat_data C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
i: z_iso_disp f xx yy
transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (maponpaths pr1 (z_iso_inv_z_iso_inv x y f)) (pr1 i) ;; 
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso i =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx)
  (pr2 (is_inverse_in_precat_inv f)) (id_disp xx)
 abstract (
            etrans ;[ apply mor_disp_transportf_postwhisker |];
            etrans ; [ apply maponpaths; apply (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp i)  | ];
            etrans ;[ apply transport_f_f |];
            apply transportf_comp_lemma; apply transportf_comp_lemma_hset;
            try apply homset_property; apply idpath ).
      
C: category
D: disp_cat_data C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
i: z_iso_disp f xx yy
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso i ;; transportb
                               (mor_disp xx yy)
                               (maponpaths pr1
                                  (z_iso_inv_z_iso_inv
                                     x y f)) (pr1 i) =
transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (pr1 (is_inverse_in_precat_inv f)) (id_disp yy)
 abstract (
            etrans ;[ apply mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker |];
            etrans ;[ apply maponpaths; apply (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor i) |];
            etrans ;[ apply transport_f_f |];
            apply transportf_comp_lemma; apply transportf_comp_lemma_hset;
            try apply homset_property; apply idpath ).
  Defined.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat_data C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
i: is_z_iso_disp f ff
is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f)
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso i)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat_data C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
i: is_z_iso_disp f ff
is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f)
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso i)

    apply (is_z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp (ff ,, i)).
  Defined.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat_data C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
i: z_iso_disp f xx yy
z_iso_disp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f) yy xx

D: disp_cat_data C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
i: z_iso_disp f xx yy
z_iso_disp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f) yy xx

    
C: category
D: disp_cat_data C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
i: z_iso_disp f xx yy
is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f)
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso i)

    apply is_z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp.
  Defined.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp f g) xx zz

f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z

gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp f g) xx zz

f: z_iso x y

xx: D x
yy: D y

gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz

D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
(λ ff : xx -->[ z_iso_comp f g] zz,
 is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp f g) ff) ?pr1

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
xx -->[ z_iso_comp f g] zz
 apply (ff ;; gg).
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
(λ ff : xx -->[ z_iso_comp f g] zz,
 is_z_iso_disp (z_iso_comp f g) ff) (ff ;; gg)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
zz -->[ inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp f g)] xx
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
(λ gg0 : zz -->[ inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp f g)] xx,
 is_disp_inverse (z_iso_comp f g) (ff ;; gg) gg0) 
  ?pr1

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
zz -->[ inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp f g)] xx
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
zz -->[
pr1
  (z_iso_comp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g)
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f))] xx

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
zz -->[ inv_from_z_iso g · inv_from_z_iso f] xx

        apply (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso ff).
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
(λ gg0 : zz -->[ inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp f g)] xx,
 is_disp_inverse (z_iso_comp f g) (ff ;; gg) gg0)
  (transportb (mor_disp zz xx)
     (maponpaths pr1
        (z_iso_inv_of_z_iso_comp x y z f g))
     (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                      ff
      :
      zz -->[
      pr1
        (z_iso_comp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g)
           (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f))] xx))
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
transportb (mor_disp zz xx)
  (maponpaths pr1 (z_iso_inv_of_z_iso_comp x y z f g))
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                   ff) ;; (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp zz zz) (pr2 (z_iso_comp f g))
  (id_disp zz)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
ff ;; gg ;; transportb (mor_disp zz xx)
              (maponpaths pr1
                 (z_iso_inv_of_z_iso_comp x y z f g))
              (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                               ff) =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 (z_iso_comp f g))
  (id_disp xx)

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
transportb (mor_disp zz xx)
  (maponpaths pr1 (z_iso_inv_of_z_iso_comp x y z f g))
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                   ff) ;; (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp zz zz) (pr2 (z_iso_comp f g))
  (id_disp zz)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
transportb (mor_disp zz xx)
  (maponpaths pr1 (z_iso_inv_of_z_iso_comp x y z f g))
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                   ff) ;; (ff ;; gg) =
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
?b =
transportb (mor_disp zz zz) (pr2 (z_iso_comp f g))
  (id_disp zz)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
transportf (mor_disp zz zz)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1
        (z_iso_comp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g)
           (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp f g))
     (z_iso_comp f g)
     (! maponpaths pr1
          (z_iso_inv_of_z_iso_comp x y z f g)))
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                   ff ;; (ff ;; gg)) =
transportb (mor_disp zz zz) (pr2 (z_iso_comp f g))
  (id_disp zz)

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
transportf (mor_disp zz zz)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1
        (z_iso_comp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g)
           (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp f g))
     (z_iso_comp f g)
     (! maponpaths pr1
          (z_iso_inv_of_z_iso_comp x y z f g)))
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                   ff ;; (ff ;; gg)) =
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
?b =
transportb (mor_disp zz zz) (pr2 (z_iso_comp f g))
  (id_disp zz)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                ff ;; (ff ;; gg) = 
?t2
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
transportf (mor_disp zz zz)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1
        (z_iso_comp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g)
           (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp f g))
     (z_iso_comp f g)
     (! maponpaths pr1
          (z_iso_inv_of_z_iso_comp x y z f g))) ?t2 =
transportb (mor_disp zz zz) (pr2 (z_iso_comp f g))
  (id_disp zz)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
transportf (mor_disp zz zz)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1
        (z_iso_comp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g)
           (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp f g))
     (z_iso_comp f g)
     (! maponpaths pr1
          (z_iso_inv_of_z_iso_comp x y z f g)))
  (transportf (mor_disp zz zz)
     (assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g)
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f) (z_iso_comp f g))
     (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso gg ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                       ff ;; (ff ;; gg)))) =
transportb (mor_disp zz zz) (pr2 (z_iso_comp f g))
  (id_disp zz)

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
transportf (mor_disp zz zz)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1
        (z_iso_comp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g)
           (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp f g))
     (z_iso_comp f g)
     (! maponpaths pr1
          (z_iso_inv_of_z_iso_comp x y z f g)))
  (transportf (mor_disp zz zz)
     (assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g)
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f) (z_iso_comp f g))
     (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso gg ;; (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                       ff ;; (ff ;; gg)))) =
?b
C: category

f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
?b =
transportb (mor_disp zz zz) (pr2 (z_iso_comp f g))
  (id_disp zz)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso ff ;; (ff ;; gg) = ?t2
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
transportf (mor_disp zz zz)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1
        (z_iso_comp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g)
           (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp f g))
     (z_iso_comp f g)
     (! maponpaths pr1
          (z_iso_inv_of_z_iso_comp x y z f g)))
  (transportf (mor_disp zz zz)
     (assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g)
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f) (z_iso_comp f g))
     (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso gg ;; ?t2)) =
transportb (mor_disp zz zz) (pr2 (z_iso_comp f g))
  (id_disp zz)

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
transportf (mor_disp zz zz)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1
        (z_iso_comp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g)
           (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp f g))
     (z_iso_comp f g)
     (! maponpaths pr1
          (z_iso_inv_of_z_iso_comp x y z f g)))
  (transportf (mor_disp zz zz)
     (assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g)
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f) (z_iso_comp f g))
     (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso gg ;; transportb
                                      (mor_disp yy zz)
                                      (assoc
                                         (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
                                            f) f g)
                                      (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                         ff ;; ff ;; gg))) =
transportb (mor_disp zz zz) (pr2 (z_iso_comp f g))
  (id_disp zz)

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
transportf (mor_disp zz zz)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1
        (z_iso_comp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g)
           (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp f g))
     (z_iso_comp f g)
     (! maponpaths pr1
          (z_iso_inv_of_z_iso_comp x y z f g)))
  (transportf (mor_disp zz zz)
     (assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g)
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f) (z_iso_comp f g))
     (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso gg ;; transportb
                                      (mor_disp yy zz)
                                      (assoc
                                         (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
                                            f) f g)
                                      (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                         ff ;; ff ;; gg))) =
?b

D: disp_cat C

f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
?b =
transportb (mor_disp zz zz) (pr2 (z_iso_comp f g))
  (id_disp zz)

x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
transportf (mor_disp zz zz)
  (maponpaths (compose (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g))
     (! assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f) f g) @
   assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g)
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f) (z_iso_comp f g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1
        (z_iso_comp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g)
           (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp f g))
     (z_iso_comp f g)
     (! maponpaths pr1
          (z_iso_inv_of_z_iso_comp x y z f g)))
  (transportf (mor_disp zz zz)
     (maponpaths (compose (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g))
        (cancel_postcomposition (identity y)
           (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f · f) g
           (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv f)))
     (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso gg ;; (id_disp yy ;; gg))) =
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
?b =
transportb (mor_disp zz zz) (pr2 (z_iso_comp f g))
  (id_disp zz)

        (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g))
     (! assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f) f g) @
   assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g)
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f) (z_iso_comp f g) @

     (! maponpaths pr1

  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso gg ;; (id_disp yy ;; gg)) =
transportb (mor_disp zz zz) (pr2 (z_iso_comp f g))
  (id_disp zz)

g: z_iso y z

id_disp yy ;; gg = ?t2

transportf (mor_disp zz zz)
  (maponpaths (compose (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g))
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity y)
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f · f) g
        (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g))
     (! assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f) f g) @
   assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g)
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f) (z_iso_comp f g) @
   cancel_postcomposition

           (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp f g))
     (z_iso_comp f g)

          (z_iso_inv_of_z_iso_comp x y z f g)))
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso gg ;; ?t2) =

  (id_disp zz)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C

f: z_iso x y

xx: D x
yy: D y

transportf (mor_disp zz zz)
  (maponpaths (compose (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g))
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity y)
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f · f) g
        (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g))
     (! assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f) f g) @
   assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g)
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f) (z_iso_comp f g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1

           (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp f g))
     (z_iso_comp f g)
     (! maponpaths pr1
          (z_iso_inv_of_z_iso_comp x y z f g)))
  (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso gg ;; transportb
                                   (mor_disp yy zz)
                                   (id_left g) gg) =

  (id_disp zz)

transportf (mor_disp zz zz)
  (maponpaths (compose (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g))
     (! id_left g) @
   maponpaths (compose (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g))
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity y)
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f · f) g
        (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g))
     (! assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f) f g) @
   assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g)
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f) (z_iso_comp f g) @

           (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp f g))
     (z_iso_comp f g)

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
transportf (mor_disp zz zz)
  (maponpaths (compose (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g))
     (! id_left g) @
   maponpaths (compose (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g))
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity y)
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f · f) g
        (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g))
     (! assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f) f g) @
   assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g)
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f) (z_iso_comp f g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1
        (z_iso_comp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g)
           (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp f g))
     (z_iso_comp f g)
     (! maponpaths pr1
          (z_iso_inv_of_z_iso_comp x y z f g)))
  (transportb (mor_disp zz zz)
     (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv g) (id_disp zz)) =
transportb (mor_disp zz zz) (pr2 (z_iso_comp f g))
  (id_disp zz)

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
transportf (mor_disp zz zz)
  (maponpaths (compose (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g))
     (! id_left g) @
   maponpaths (compose (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g))
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity y)
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f · f) g
        (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g))
     (! assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f) f g) @
   assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g)
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f) (z_iso_comp f g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1
        (z_iso_comp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g)
           (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp f g))
     (z_iso_comp f g)
     (! maponpaths pr1
          (z_iso_inv_of_z_iso_comp x y z f g)))
  (transportb (mor_disp zz zz)
     (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv g) (id_disp zz)) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
?b =
transportb (mor_disp zz zz) (pr2 (z_iso_comp f g))
  (id_disp zz)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
transportf (mor_disp zz zz)
  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv g @
   maponpaths (compose (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g))
     (! id_left g) @
   maponpaths (compose (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g))
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity y)
        (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f · f) g
        (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv f)) @
   maponpaths (compose (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g))
     (! assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f) f g) @
   assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g)
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f) (z_iso_comp f g) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1
        (z_iso_comp (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso g)
           (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f)))
     (inv_from_z_iso (z_iso_comp f g))
     (z_iso_comp f g)
     (! maponpaths pr1
          (z_iso_inv_of_z_iso_comp x y z f g)))
  (id_disp zz) =
transportb (mor_disp zz zz) (pr2 (z_iso_comp f g))
  (id_disp zz)

          apply transportf_comp_lemma; apply transportf_comp_lemma_hset;
            try apply homset_property; apply idpath.
        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
ff ;; gg ;; transportb (mor_disp zz xx)
              (maponpaths pr1
                 (z_iso_inv_of_z_iso_comp x y z f g))
              (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                               ff) =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 (z_iso_comp f g))
  (id_disp xx)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
ff ;; gg ;; transportb (mor_disp zz xx)
              (maponpaths pr1
                 (z_iso_inv_of_z_iso_comp x y z f g))
              (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso gg ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                               ff) =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx)
  (pr1 (is_inverse_in_precat_comp f g)) (id_disp xx)

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C

xx: D x
yy: D y

transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
  (assoc f g (inv_from_z_iso g · inv_from_z_iso f))
  (ff ;; transportf (mor_disp yy xx)
           (maponpaths (compose g)
              (! maponpaths pr1
                   (z_iso_inv_of_z_iso_comp x y z f g)))
           (transportb (mor_disp yy xx)
              (assoc g (inv_from_z_iso g)
                 (inv_from_z_iso f))
              (transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
                 (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso g)
                 (id_disp yy) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso

  (pr1 (is_inverse_in_precat_comp f g)) (id_disp xx)

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z

transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
  (assoc f g (inv_from_z_iso g · inv_from_z_iso f))
  (ff ;; transportf (mor_disp yy xx)
           (maponpaths (compose g)
              (! maponpaths pr1
                   (z_iso_inv_of_z_iso_comp x y z f g)))
           (transportb (mor_disp yy xx)
              (assoc g (inv_from_z_iso g)
                 (inv_from_z_iso f))
              (transportf (mor_disp yy xx)
                 (cancel_postcomposition (identity y)
                    (g · inv_from_z_iso g)
                    (inv_from_z_iso f)
                    (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso g))
                 (id_disp yy ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso
                                  ff)))) =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx)
  (pr1 (is_inverse_in_precat_comp f g)) (id_disp xx)

                    (g · inv_from_z_iso g)
                    (inv_from_z_iso f)
                    (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso g))
                 (transportb (mor_disp yy xx)
                    (id_left (inv_from_z_iso f))
                    (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso ff))))) =

  (pr1 (is_inverse_in_precat_comp f g)) (id_disp xx)

transportb (mor_disp xx xx)
  (pr1 (is_inverse_in_precat_comp f g)) (id_disp xx)

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
  (assoc f g (inv_from_z_iso g · inv_from_z_iso f))
  (ff ;; transportf (mor_disp yy xx)
           (! assoc g (inv_from_z_iso g)
                (inv_from_z_iso f) @
            maponpaths (compose g)
              (! maponpaths pr1
                   (z_iso_inv_of_z_iso_comp x y z f g)))
           (transportf (mor_disp yy xx)
              (cancel_postcomposition (identity y)
                 (g · inv_from_z_iso g)
                 (inv_from_z_iso f)
                 (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso g))
              (transportb (mor_disp yy xx)
                 (id_left (inv_from_z_iso f))
                 (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso ff)))) = 
?b

xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
?b =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx)
  (pr1 (is_inverse_in_precat_comp f g)) (id_disp xx)

   maponpaths (compose g)
     (! maponpaths pr1
          (z_iso_inv_of_z_iso_comp x y z f g)))

  (assoc f g (inv_from_z_iso g · inv_from_z_iso f))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
     (maponpaths (compose f)

           (g · inv_from_z_iso g) (inv_from_z_iso f)
           (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso g) @
         ! assoc g (inv_from_z_iso g)

        (g · inv_from_z_iso g) (inv_from_z_iso f)
        (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso g) @
      ! assoc g (inv_from_z_iso g) (inv_from_z_iso f) @
      maponpaths (compose g)
        (! maponpaths pr1
             (z_iso_inv_of_z_iso_comp x y z f g))) @
   assoc f g (inv_from_z_iso g · inv_from_z_iso f))

     (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso f) (id_disp xx)) =

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
  (maponpaths (compose f)
     (! id_left (inv_from_z_iso f) @
      cancel_postcomposition (identity y)
        (g · inv_from_z_iso g) (inv_from_z_iso f)
        (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso g) @
      ! assoc g (inv_from_z_iso g) (inv_from_z_iso f) @
      maponpaths (compose g)
        (! maponpaths pr1
             (z_iso_inv_of_z_iso_comp x y z f g))) @
   assoc f g (inv_from_z_iso g · inv_from_z_iso f))
  (transportb (mor_disp xx xx)
     (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso f) (id_disp xx)) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
?b =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx)
  (pr1 (is_inverse_in_precat_comp f g)) (id_disp xx)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: z_iso x y
g: z_iso y z
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
gg: z_iso_disp g yy zz
transportf (mor_disp xx xx)
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso f @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (! id_left (inv_from_z_iso f) @
      cancel_postcomposition (identity y)
        (g · inv_from_z_iso g) (inv_from_z_iso f)
        (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso g) @
      ! assoc g (inv_from_z_iso g) (inv_from_z_iso f) @
      maponpaths (compose g)
        (! maponpaths pr1
             (z_iso_inv_of_z_iso_comp x y z f g))) @
   assoc f g (inv_from_z_iso g · inv_from_z_iso f))
  (id_disp xx) =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx)
  (pr1 (is_inverse_in_precat_comp f g)) (id_disp xx)

          apply transportf_comp_lemma; apply transportf_comp_lemma_hset;
            try apply homset_property; apply idpath.
  Defined.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (id_disp xx)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) (id_disp xx)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
id_disp xx ;; id_disp xx =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr2 (identity_z_iso x))
  (id_disp xx)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
id_disp xx ;; id_disp xx =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 (identity_z_iso x))
  (id_disp xx)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
id_disp xx ;; id_disp xx =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr2 (identity_z_iso x))
  (id_disp xx)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
id_disp xx ;; id_disp xx = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
?b =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr2 (identity_z_iso x))
  (id_disp xx)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
transportb (mor_disp xx xx)
  (id_left (identity_z_iso x)) (id_disp xx) =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr2 (identity_z_iso x))
  (id_disp xx)

      apply maponpaths_2, homset_property.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
id_disp xx ;; id_disp xx =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 (identity_z_iso x))
  (id_disp xx)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
id_disp xx ;; id_disp xx = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
?b =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 (identity_z_iso x))
  (id_disp xx)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx: D x
transportb (mor_disp xx xx)
  (id_left (inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso x)))
  (id_disp xx) =
transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 (identity_z_iso x))
  (id_disp xx)

      apply maponpaths_2, homset_property.
  Defined.

  Definition identity_z_iso_disp {C} {D : disp_cat C} {x : C} (xx : D x)
    : z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) xx xx
    := (_ ,, id_is_z_iso_disp _).

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, x': C
e: x = x'
xx: D x
xx': D x'
ee: transportf D e xx = xx'
z_iso_disp (idtoiso e) xx xx'

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, x': C
e: x = x'
xx: D x
xx': D x'
ee: transportf D e xx = xx'
z_iso_disp (idtoiso e) xx xx'

    destruct e, ee; apply identity_z_iso_disp.
  Defined.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx, xx': D x
ee: xx = xx'
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) xx xx'

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx, xx': D x
ee: xx = xx'
z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) xx xx'

    exact (idtoiso_disp (idpath _) ee).
  Defined.


  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
∏ (y' : C) (f' : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧) (yy' : D y'),
isweq (λ ff' : yy -->[ f'] yy', pr1 ff ;; ff')

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
∏ (y' : C) (f' : C ⟦ y, y' ⟧) (yy' : D y'),
isweq (λ ff' : yy -->[ f'] yy', pr1 ff ;; ff')

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
yy': D y'
isweq (λ ff' : yy -->[ f'] yy', pr1 ff ;; ff')

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
yy': D y'
xx -->[ f · f'] yy' → yy -->[ f'] yy'
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
yy': D y'
∏ x0 : yy -->[ f'] yy',
?g ((λ ff' : yy -->[ f'] yy', pr1 ff ;; ff') x0) = x0
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
yy': D y'
∏ y0 : xx -->[ f · f'] yy',
(λ ff' : yy -->[ f'] yy', pr1 ff ;; ff') (?g y0) = y0

D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
yy': D y'
xx -->[ f · f'] yy' → yy -->[ f'] yy'
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
yy': D y'
X: xx -->[ f · f'] yy'
yy -->[ f'] yy'

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
yy': D y'
X: xx -->[ f · f'] yy'
XR:= pr1 (pr2 ff) ;; X: yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f · (f · f')] yy'
yy -->[ f'] yy'

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
yy': D y'
X: xx -->[ f · f'] yy'
XR:= pr1 (pr2 ff) ;; X: yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f · (f · f')] yy'
XR':= transportf (mor_disp yy yy')
  (assoc (inv_from_z_iso f) f f') XR: yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f · f · f'] yy'
yy -->[ f'] yy'

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
yy': D y'
X: xx -->[ f · f'] yy'
XR:= pr1 (pr2 ff) ;; X: yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f · (f · f')] yy'
XR':= transportf (mor_disp yy yy')
  (assoc (inv_from_z_iso f) f f') XR: yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f · f · f'] yy'
XRRT:= transportf (mor_disp yy yy')
(maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ y, y ⟧, xyz · f') (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv f)) XR': yy -->[ identity y · f'] yy'
yy -->[ f'] yy'

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
yy': D y'
X: xx -->[ f · f'] yy'
XR:= pr1 (pr2 ff) ;; X: yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f · (f · f')] yy'
XR':= transportf (mor_disp yy yy')
  (assoc (inv_from_z_iso f) f f') XR: yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso f · f · f'] yy'
XRRT:= transportf (mor_disp yy yy')
(maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ y, y ⟧, xyz · f') (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv f)) XR': yy -->[ identity y · f'] yy'
XRRT':= transportf (mor_disp yy yy') (id_left f') XRRT: yy -->[ f'] yy'
yy -->[ f'] yy'

      apply XRRT'.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
yy': D y'
∏ x0 : yy -->[ f'] yy',
(λ X : xx -->[ f · f'] yy',
 let XR := pr1 (pr2 ff) ;; X in
 let XR' :=
   transportf (mor_disp yy yy')
     (assoc (inv_from_z_iso f) f f') XR in
 let XRRT :=
   transportf (mor_disp yy yy')
     (maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ y, y ⟧, xyz · f')
        (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv f)) XR' in
 let XRRT' :=
   transportf (mor_disp yy yy') (id_left f') XRRT in
 XRRT') ((λ ff' : yy -->[ f'] yy', pr1 ff ;; ff') x0) =
x0
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
yy': D y'
x0: yy -->[ f'] yy'
(λ X : xx -->[ f · f'] yy',
 let XR := pr1 (pr2 ff) ;; X in
 let XR' :=
   transportf (mor_disp yy yy')
     (assoc (inv_from_z_iso f) f f') XR in
 let XRRT :=
   transportf (mor_disp yy yy')
     (maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ y, y ⟧, xyz · f')
        (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv f)) XR' in
 let XRRT' :=
   transportf (mor_disp yy yy') (id_left f') XRRT in
 XRRT') ((λ ff' : yy -->[ f'] yy', pr1 ff ;; ff') x0) =
x0
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
yy': D y'
x0: yy -->[ f'] yy'
transportf (mor_disp yy yy') (id_left f')
  (transportf (mor_disp yy yy')
     (maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ y, y ⟧, xyz · f')
        (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv f))
     (transportf (mor_disp yy yy')
        (assoc (inv_from_z_iso f) f f')
        (pr1 (pr2 ff) ;; (pr1 ff ;; x0)))) = x0

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
yy': D y'
x0: yy -->[ f'] yy'
transportf (mor_disp yy yy') (id_left f')
  (transportf (mor_disp yy yy')
     (maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ y, y ⟧, xyz · f')
        (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv f))
     (transportf (mor_disp yy yy')
        (assoc (inv_from_z_iso f) f f')
        (pr1 (pr2 ff) ;; (pr1 ff ;; x0)))) = ?b

D: disp_cat C

yy: D y
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy

f': C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
yy': D y'
x0: yy -->[ f'] yy'
?b = x0

D: disp_cat C
x, y: C

yy: D y
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy

f': C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
yy': D y'
x0: yy -->[ f'] yy'
transportf (mor_disp yy yy')
  (maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ y, y ⟧, xyz · f')
     (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv f) @ id_left f')
  (transportf (mor_disp yy yy')
     (assoc (inv_from_z_iso f) f f')
     (pr1 (pr2 ff) ;; (pr1 ff ;; x0))) = x0

x, y: C

yy: D y

transportf (mor_disp yy yy')
  (! assoc (inv_from_z_iso f) f f' @
   assoc (inv_from_z_iso f) f f' @
   maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ y, y ⟧, xyz · f')

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
yy': D y'
x0: yy -->[ f'] yy'
transportf (mor_disp yy yy')
  (! assoc (inv_from_z_iso f) f f' @
   assoc (inv_from_z_iso f) f f' @
   maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ y, y ⟧, xyz · f')
     (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv f) @ id_left f')
  (transportf (mor_disp yy yy')
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity y)
        (inv_from_z_iso f · f) f' (! pr2 f))
     (id_disp yy ;; x0)) = x0

   assoc (inv_from_z_iso f) f f' @
   maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ y, y ⟧, xyz · f')
     (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv f) @ id_left f') ?t2 = x0
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
yy': D y'
x0: yy -->[ f'] yy'
transportf (mor_disp yy yy')
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity y)
     (inv_from_z_iso f · f) f' (! pr2 f) @
   ! assoc (inv_from_z_iso f) f f' @
   assoc (inv_from_z_iso f) f f' @
   maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ y, y ⟧, xyz · f')
     (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv f) @ id_left f')
  (transportb (mor_disp yy yy') (id_left f') x0) = x0

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
yy': D y'
x0: yy -->[ f'] yy'
transportf (mor_disp yy yy')
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity y)
     (inv_from_z_iso f · f) f' (! pr2 f) @
   ! assoc (inv_from_z_iso f) f f' @
   assoc (inv_from_z_iso f) f f' @
   maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ y, y ⟧, xyz · f')
     (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv f) @ id_left f')
  (transportb (mor_disp yy yy') (id_left f') x0) = 
?b

D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
yy': D y'
x0: yy -->[ f'] yy'
transportf (mor_disp yy yy')
  (! id_left f' @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity y)
     (inv_from_z_iso f · f) f' (! pr2 f) @
   ! assoc (inv_from_z_iso f) f f' @
   assoc (inv_from_z_iso f) f f' @
   maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ y, y ⟧, xyz · f')
     (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv f) @ id_left f') x0 = x0

 apply idpath.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
yy': D y'
∏ y0 : xx -->[ f · f'] yy',
(λ ff' : yy -->[ f'] yy', pr1 ff ;; ff')
  ((λ X : xx -->[ f · f'] yy',
    let XR := pr1 (pr2 ff) ;; X in
    let XR' :=
      transportf (mor_disp yy yy')
        (assoc (inv_from_z_iso f) f f') XR in
    let XRRT :=
      transportf (mor_disp yy yy')
        (maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ y, y ⟧, xyz · f')
           (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv f)) XR' in
    let XRRT' :=
      transportf (mor_disp yy yy') (id_left f') XRRT
      in
    XRRT') y0) = y0
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
yy': D y'
y0: xx -->[ f · f'] yy'
pr1 ff ;; transportf (mor_disp yy yy') (id_left f')
            (transportf (mor_disp yy yy')
               (maponpaths
                  (λ xyz : C ⟦ y, y ⟧, xyz · f')
                  (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv f))
               (transportf (mor_disp yy yy')
                  (assoc (inv_from_z_iso f) f f')
                  (pr1 (pr2 ff) ;; y0))) = y0

         (id_disp yy),

  (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 ff)))

f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y, y' ⟧
yy': D y'
y0: xx -->[ f · f'] yy'
transportf (mor_disp xx yy')
  (! assoc f (inv_from_z_iso f) (f · f') @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (assoc (inv_from_z_iso f) f f') @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ y, y ⟧, xyz · f')
        (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv f) @ id_left f'))
  (transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx) ;; y0) =
y0

D: disp_cat C

xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: z_iso_disp f xx yy

yy': D y'
y0: xx -->[ f · f'] yy'

  (! assoc f (inv_from_z_iso f) (f · f') @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (assoc (inv_from_z_iso f) f f') @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ y, y ⟧, xyz · f')
        (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv f) @ id_left f'))
  (transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 f) (id_disp xx) ;; y0) =
?b

y0: xx -->[ f · f'] yy'
transportf (mor_disp xx yy')
  (! assoc f (inv_from_z_iso f) (f · f') @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (assoc (inv_from_z_iso f) f f') @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ y, y ⟧, xyz · f')
        (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv f) @ id_left f'))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy')
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
        (f · inv_from_z_iso f) (f · f') (! pr1 f))
     (id_disp xx ;; y0)) = y0

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ii: z_iso_disp i xx yy
∏ (x' : C) (f' : C ⟦ x', x ⟧) (xx' : D x'),
isweq (λ ff : xx' -->[ f'] xx, ff ;; ii)

i: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ii: z_iso_disp i xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y', x ⟧
yy': D y'
∏ x0 : yy' -->[ f'] xx,
?g ((λ ff : yy' -->[ f'] xx, ff ;; ii) x0) = x0

x, y: C

f': C ⟦ y', x ⟧
yy': D y'
∏ y0 : yy' -->[ f' · i] yy,
(λ ff : yy' -->[ f'] xx, ff ;; ii) (?g y0) = y0

D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ii: z_iso_disp i xx yy
y': C

yy': D y'
X: yy' -->[ f' · i] yy
yy' -->[ f'] xx

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ii: z_iso_disp i xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y', x ⟧
yy': D y'
X: yy' -->[ f' · i] yy
XR:= X ;; pr1 (pr2 ii): yy' -->[ f' · i · inv_from_z_iso i] xx
yy' -->[ f'] xx

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ii: z_iso_disp i xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y', x ⟧
yy': D y'
X: yy' -->[ f' · i] yy
XR:= X ;; pr1 (pr2 ii): yy' -->[ f' · i · inv_from_z_iso i] xx
XR':= transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)
  (! assoc f' i (inv_from_z_iso i)) XR: (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx) (f' · (i · inv_from_z_iso i))
yy' -->[ f'] xx

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ii: z_iso_disp i xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y', x ⟧
yy': D y'
X: yy' -->[ f' · i] yy
XR:= X ;; pr1 (pr2 ii): yy' -->[ f' · i · inv_from_z_iso i] xx
XR':= transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)
  (! assoc f' i (inv_from_z_iso i)) XR: (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx) (f' · (i · inv_from_z_iso i))
XRRT:= transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)
(maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, f' · xyz) (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso i)) XR': (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)
  (f' · identity x)
yy' -->[ f'] xx

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ii: z_iso_disp i xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y', x ⟧
yy': D y'
X: yy' -->[ f' · i] yy
XR:= X ;; pr1 (pr2 ii): yy' -->[ f' · i · inv_from_z_iso i] xx
XR':= transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)
  (! assoc f' i (inv_from_z_iso i)) XR: (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx) (f' · (i · inv_from_z_iso i))
XRRT:= transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)
(maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, f' · xyz) (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso i)) XR': (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)
  (f' · identity x)
XRRT':= transportf
  (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)
  (id_right f') XRRT: (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx) f'
yy' -->[ f'] xx

      apply XRRT'.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ii: z_iso_disp i xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y', x ⟧
yy': D y'
∏ x0 : yy' -->[ f'] xx,
(λ X : yy' -->[ f' · i] yy,
 let XR := X ;; pr1 (pr2 ii) in
 let XR' :=
   transportf (λ x1 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x1] xx)
     (! assoc f' i (inv_from_z_iso i)) XR in
 let XRRT :=
   transportf (λ x1 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x1] xx)
     (maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, f' · xyz)
        (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso i)) XR' in
 let XRRT' :=
   transportf (λ x1 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x1] xx)
     (id_right f') XRRT in
 XRRT') ((λ ff : yy' -->[ f'] xx, ff ;; ii) x0) = x0
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ii: z_iso_disp i xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y', x ⟧
yy': D y'
x0: yy' -->[ f'] xx
(λ X : yy' -->[ f' · i] yy,
 let XR := X ;; pr1 (pr2 ii) in
 let XR' :=
   transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)
     (! assoc f' i (inv_from_z_iso i)) XR in
 let XRRT :=
   transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)
     (maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, f' · xyz)
        (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso i)) XR' in
 let XRRT' :=
   transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)
     (id_right f') XRRT in
 XRRT') ((λ ff : yy' -->[ f'] xx, ff ;; ii) x0) = x0
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ii: z_iso_disp i xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y', x ⟧
yy': D y'
x0: yy' -->[ f'] xx
transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)
  (id_right f')
  (transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)
     (maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, f' · xyz)
        (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso i))
     (transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)
        (! assoc f' i (inv_from_z_iso i))
        (x0 ;; ii ;; pr1 (pr2 ii)))) = x0

yy: D y

yy': D y'
x0: yy' -->[ f'] xx
transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)
  (id_right f')
  (transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)
     (maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, f' · xyz)
        (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso i))
     (transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)
        (! assoc f' i (inv_from_z_iso i))
        (x0 ;; ii ;; pr1 (pr2 ii)))) = ?b

  (transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)

  (! assoc f' i (inv_from_z_iso i) @
   maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, f' · xyz)
     (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso i) @ id_right f')
  (x0 ;; ii ;; pr1 (pr2 ii)) = x0

yy': D y'
x0: yy' -->[ f'] xx
transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)
  (! assoc f' i (inv_from_z_iso i) @
   maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, f' · xyz)
     (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso i) @ id_right f')
  (x0 ;; ii ;; pr1 (pr2 ii)) = ?b

   assoc f' i (inv_from_z_iso i) @
   ! assoc f' i (inv_from_z_iso i) @
   maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, f' · xyz)

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ii: z_iso_disp i xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y', x ⟧

x0: yy' -->[ f'] xx
x0 = x0
 apply idpath.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ii: z_iso_disp i xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y', x ⟧
yy': D y'
∏ y0 : yy' -->[ f' · i] yy,
(λ ff : yy' -->[ f'] xx, ff ;; ii)
  ((λ X : yy' -->[ f' · i] yy,
    let XR := X ;; pr1 (pr2 ii) in
    let XR' :=
      transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)
        (! assoc f' i (inv_from_z_iso i)) XR in
    let XRRT :=
      transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)
        (maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, f' · xyz)
           (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso i)) XR' in
    let XRRT' :=
      transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)
        (id_right f') XRRT in
    XRRT') y0) = y0
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ii: z_iso_disp i xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y', x ⟧
yy': D y'
y0: yy' -->[ f' · i] yy
transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)
  (id_right f')
  (transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)
     (maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, f' · xyz)
        (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso i))
     (transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)
        (! assoc f' i (inv_from_z_iso i))
        (y0 ;; pr1 (pr2 ii)))) ;; ii = y0

xx: D x
yy: D y
ii: z_iso_disp i xx yy
y': C

yy': D y'
y0: yy' -->[ f' · i] yy
transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)
  (id_right f')
  (transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)
     (maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, f' · xyz)
        (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso i))
     (transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)
        (! assoc f' i (inv_from_z_iso i))
        (y0 ;; pr1 (pr2 ii)))) ;; ii = ?b

     (transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)

D: disp_cat C

yy: D y
ii: z_iso_disp i xx yy

f': C ⟦ y', x ⟧

transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)
  (maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, f' · xyz)
     (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso i) @ id_right f')

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ii: z_iso_disp i xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y', x ⟧
yy': D y'
y0: yy' -->[ f' · i] yy
transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)
  (maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, f' · xyz)
     (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso i) @ id_right f')
  (transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)
     (! assoc f' i (inv_from_z_iso i))

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ii: z_iso_disp i xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y', x ⟧
yy': D y'
y0: yy' -->[ f' · i] yy
?b = y0
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ii: z_iso_disp i xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y', x ⟧
yy': D y'
y0: yy' -->[ f' · i] yy
transportf (mor_disp yy' yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (f' · (i · inv_from_z_iso i)) f' i
     (maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, f' · xyz)
        (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso i) @ id_right f'))
  (transportf (λ x0 : C ⟦ y', x ⟧, yy' -->[ x0] xx)
     (! assoc f' i (inv_from_z_iso i))
     (y0 ;; pr1 (pr2 ii)) ;; ii) = y0

   assoc (f' · i) (inv_from_z_iso i) i @
   cancel_postcomposition (f' · i · inv_from_z_iso i)
     (f' · (i · inv_from_z_iso i)) i
     (! assoc f' i (inv_from_z_iso i)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (f' · (i · inv_from_z_iso i)) f' i
     (maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, f' · xyz)
        (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso i) @ id_right f'))
  (y0 ;; id_disp yy) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ii: z_iso_disp i xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y', x ⟧
yy': D y'
y0: yy' -->[ f' · i] yy
?b = y0
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ii: z_iso_disp i xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y', x ⟧
yy': D y'
y0: yy' -->[ f' · i] yy
y0 ;; id_disp yy = ?t2
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ii: z_iso_disp i xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y', x ⟧
yy': D y'
y0: yy' -->[ f' · i] yy
transportf (mor_disp yy' yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (f' · i)) (! pr2 i) @
   assoc (f' · i) (inv_from_z_iso i) i @
   cancel_postcomposition (f' · i · inv_from_z_iso i)
     (f' · (i · inv_from_z_iso i)) i
     (! assoc f' i (inv_from_z_iso i)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (f' · (i · inv_from_z_iso i)) f' i
     (maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, f' · xyz)
        (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso i) @ id_right f')) 
  ?t2 = y0
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ii: z_iso_disp i xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y', x ⟧
yy': D y'
y0: yy' -->[ f' · i] yy
transportf (mor_disp yy' yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (f' · i)) (! pr2 i) @
   assoc (f' · i) (inv_from_z_iso i) i @
   cancel_postcomposition (f' · i · inv_from_z_iso i)
     (f' · (i · inv_from_z_iso i)) i
     (! assoc f' i (inv_from_z_iso i)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (f' · (i · inv_from_z_iso i)) f' i
     (maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, f' · xyz)
        (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso i) @ id_right f'))
  (transportb (mor_disp yy' yy) (id_right (f' · i)) y0) =
y0

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ii: z_iso_disp i xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y', x ⟧
yy': D y'
y0: yy' -->[ f' · i] yy
transportf (mor_disp yy' yy)
  (maponpaths (compose (f' · i)) (! pr2 i) @
   assoc (f' · i) (inv_from_z_iso i) i @
   cancel_postcomposition (f' · i · inv_from_z_iso i)
     (f' · (i · inv_from_z_iso i)) i
     (! assoc f' i (inv_from_z_iso i)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (f' · (i · inv_from_z_iso i)) f' i
     (maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, f' · xyz)
        (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso i) @ id_right f'))
  (transportb (mor_disp yy' yy) (id_right (f' · i)) y0) =
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ii: z_iso_disp i xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y', x ⟧
yy': D y'
y0: yy' -->[ f' · i] yy
?b = y0
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ii: z_iso_disp i xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y', x ⟧
yy': D y'
y0: yy' -->[ f' · i] yy
transportf (mor_disp yy' yy)
  (! id_right (f' · i) @
   maponpaths (compose (f' · i)) (! pr2 i) @
   assoc (f' · i) (inv_from_z_iso i) i @
   cancel_postcomposition (f' · i · inv_from_z_iso i)
     (f' · (i · inv_from_z_iso i)) i
     (! assoc f' i (inv_from_z_iso i)) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (f' · (i · inv_from_z_iso i)) f' i
     (maponpaths (λ xyz : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, f' · xyz)
        (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso i) @ id_right f')) y0 =
y0

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ii: z_iso_disp i xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y', x ⟧
yy': D y'
y0: yy' -->[ f' · i] yy
isaset (C ⟦ y', y ⟧)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ii: z_iso_disp i xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y', x ⟧
yy': D y'
y0: yy' -->[ f' · i] yy
y0 = y0

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
i: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ii: z_iso_disp i xx yy
y': C
f': C ⟦ y', x ⟧
yy': D y'
y0: yy' -->[ f' · i] yy
y0 = y0
 apply idpath.
  Defined.


  (* Useful when you want to prove [is_z_iso_disp], and you have some lemma [awesome_lemma] which gives that, but over a different (or just opaque) proof of [is_z_isomorphism] in the base.  Then you can use [eapply is_z_iso_disp_independent_of_is_z_iso; apply awesome_lemma.]. *)
  
C: category
D: disp_cat_data C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
H'f: is_z_isomorphism f
Hff: is_z_iso_disp ((f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),, H'f) ff
is_z_iso_disp f ff

  
C: category
D: disp_cat_data C
x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
H'f: is_z_isomorphism f
Hff: is_z_iso_disp ((f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),, H'f) ff
is_z_iso_disp f ff

    
C: category
D: disp_cat_data C
x, y: C
F: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism F
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ F,, Hf] yy
H'f: is_z_isomorphism (F,, Hf)
Hff: is_z_iso_disp ((F,, Hf),, H'f) ff
is_z_iso_disp (F,, Hf) ff

    
C: category
D: disp_cat_data C
x, y: C
F: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism F
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ F,, Hf] yy
H'f: is_z_isomorphism (F,, Hf)
Hff: is_z_iso_disp ((F,, Hf),, H'f) ff
Hf = H'f
C: category
D: disp_cat_data C
x, y: C
F: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism F
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ F,, Hf] yy
H'f: is_z_isomorphism (F,, Hf)
Hff: is_z_iso_disp ((F,, Hf),, H'f) ff
E: Hf = H'f
is_z_iso_disp (F,, Hf) ff
 
C: category
D: disp_cat_data C
x, y: C
F: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism F
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ F,, Hf] yy
H'f: is_z_isomorphism (F,, Hf)
Hff: is_z_iso_disp ((F,, Hf),, H'f) ff
E: Hf = H'f
is_z_iso_disp (F,, Hf) ff

    
C: category
D: disp_cat_data C
x, y: C
F: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism F
xx: D x
yy: pr1 D y
ff: xx -->[ F,, Hf] yy
Hff: is_z_iso_disp ((F,, Hf),, Hf) ff
is_z_iso_disp (F,, Hf) ff
 exact Hff.
  Qed.

End Isos.

(** ** More utility lemmas *)

(** A few more general lemmas for displayed-cat algebra, that require isomorphisms to state. *)
Section Utilities.

  (** Note: closely analogous to [idtoiso_precompose].  We name it differently to fit the convention of naming equalities according to their LHS, for reference during calculation. *)
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
f: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
cc, cc': D c
e: cc = cc'
dd: pr1 D d
ff: cc -->[ f] dd
transportf (λ xx : D c, xx -->[ f] dd) e ff =
transportf (mor_disp cc' dd) (id_left f)
  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath c) e) ;; ff)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
f: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
cc, cc': D c
e: cc = cc'
dd: pr1 D d
ff: cc -->[ f] dd
transportf (λ xx : D c, xx -->[ f] dd) e ff =
transportf (mor_disp cc' dd) (id_left f)
  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp
     (idtoiso_disp (idpath c) e) ;; ff)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
f: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
cc: D c
dd: pr1 D d
ff: cc -->[ f] dd
ff =
transportf (mor_disp cc dd) (id_left f)
  (id_disp cc ;; ff)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
c, d: C
f: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
cc: D c
dd: pr1 D d
ff: cc -->[ f] dd
ff =
transportf (mor_disp cc dd) (id_left f)
  (transportb (mor_disp cc dd) (id_left f) ff)

    apply pathsinv0, transportfbinv.
  Qed.

  (* TODO: add dual [transportf_postcompose_disp]. *)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff' → ff = ff'

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff' → ff = ff'

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'
ff = ff'

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'
bb -->[ f] cc
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'
ff = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'
?b = ff'

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'
bb -->[ f] cc
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'
z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · i · f = f

      etrans; [ apply maponpaths_2, z_iso_after_z_iso_inv | apply id_left ].
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'
ff =
transportf (mor_disp bb cc)
  (maponpaths_2 compose (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) f @
   id_left f)
  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp ii ;; ii ;; ff)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'
transportf (mor_disp bb cc)
  (maponpaths_2 compose (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) f @
   id_left f)
  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp ii ;; ii ;; ff) = ff

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'
transportf (mor_disp bb cc)
  (maponpaths_2 compose (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) f @
   id_left f)
  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp ii ;; ii ;; ff) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'
?b = ff
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'
z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp ii ;; ii ;; ff =
transportf (mor_disp bb cc) ?e ?y'
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'
transportf (mor_disp bb cc)
  (?e @
   maponpaths_2 compose (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) f @
   id_left f) ?y' = ff

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'
transportf (mor_disp bb cc)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity b)
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · i) f
     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) @
   maponpaths_2 compose (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) f @
   id_left f) (id_disp bb ;; ff) = ff

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'
transportf (mor_disp bb cc)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity b)
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · i) f
     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) @
   maponpaths_2 compose (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) f @
   id_left f)
  (transportb (mor_disp bb cc) (id_left f) ff) = ff

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'
transportf (mor_disp bb cc)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity b)
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · i) f
     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) @
   maponpaths_2 compose (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) f @
   id_left f)
  (transportb (mor_disp bb cc) (id_left f) ff) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'
?b = ff
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'
transportf (mor_disp bb cc)
  (! id_left f @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity b)
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · i) f
     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) @
   maponpaths_2 compose (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) f @
   id_left f) ff = ff

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'
! id_left f @
cancel_postcomposition (identity b)
  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · i) f
  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) @
maponpaths_2 compose (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) f @
id_left f = idpath f

      apply homset_property.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'
transportf (mor_disp bb cc)
  (maponpaths_2 compose (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) f @
   id_left f)
  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp ii ;; ii ;; ff) = ff'

cc: pr1 D c

transportf (mor_disp bb cc)
  (maponpaths_2 compose (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) f @
   id_left f)
  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp ii ;; ii ;; ff) = ?b

D: disp_cat C

aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'

C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'
transportf (mor_disp bb cc)
  (assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i) i f @
   maponpaths_2 compose (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) f @
   id_left f)
  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp ii ;; (ii ;; ff)) = ff'

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C

ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc

transportf (mor_disp bb cc)
  (assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i) i f @
   maponpaths_2 compose (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) f @
   id_left f)
  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp ii ;; (ii ;; ff')) = ff'

  (assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i) i f @
   maponpaths_2 compose (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) f @
   id_left f)
  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp ii ;; (ii ;; ff')) = 
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C

aa: D a
