C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'
transportf (mor_disp bb cc)
  (! assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i) i f @
   assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i) i f @
   maponpaths_2 compose (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) f @
   id_left f)
  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp ii ;; ii ;; ff') = ff'

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'
transportf (mor_disp bb cc)
  (! assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i) i f @
   assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i) i f @
   maponpaths_2 compose (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) f @
   id_left f)
  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp ii ;; ii ;; ff') = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'
?b = ff'
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'
z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp ii ;; ii ;; ff' =
transportf (mor_disp bb cc) ?e ?y'
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'
transportf (mor_disp bb cc)
  (?e @
   ! assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i) i f @
   assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i) i f @
   maponpaths_2 compose (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) f @
   id_left f) ?y' = ff'

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'
transportf (mor_disp bb cc)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity b)
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · i) f
     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) @
   ! assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i) i f @
   assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i) i f @
   maponpaths_2 compose (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) f @
   id_left f) (id_disp bb ;; ff') = ff'

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'
transportf (mor_disp bb cc)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity b)
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · i) f
     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) @
   ! assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i) i f @
   assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i) i f @
   maponpaths_2 compose (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) f @
   id_left f)
  (transportb (mor_disp bb cc) (id_left f) ff') = ff'

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'
transportf (mor_disp bb cc)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity b)
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · i) f
     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) @
   ! assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i) i f @
   assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i) i f @
   maponpaths_2 compose (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) f @
   id_left f)
  (transportb (mor_disp bb cc) (id_left f) ff') = 
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'
?b = ff'
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'
transportf (mor_disp bb cc)
  (! id_left f @
   cancel_postcomposition (identity b)
     (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · i) f
     (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) @
   ! assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i) i f @
   assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i) i f @
   maponpaths_2 compose (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) f @
   id_left f) ff' = ff'

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
a, b, c: C
i: z_iso a b
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
cc: pr1 D c
ii: z_iso_disp i aa bb
ff, ff': bb -->[ f] cc
e: ii ;; ff = ii ;; ff'
! id_left f @
cancel_postcomposition (identity b)
  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i · i) f
  (! z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) @
! assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i) i f @
assoc (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i) i f @
maponpaths_2 compose (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv i) f @
id_left f = idpath f

      apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  (* TODO: add dual [postcomp_with_iso_disp_is_inj]. *)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (h,, Hh) hh
pp: ff ;; hh =
transportb (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
  (gg ;; hh)
ff = transportb (mor_disp xx yy) p gg

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (h,, Hh) hh
pp: ff ;; hh =
transportb (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
  (gg ;; hh)
ff = transportb (mor_disp xx yy) p gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (h,, Hh) hh
pp: ff ;; hh =
transportb (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
  (gg ;; hh)
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right f)
  (ff ;; id_disp yy) =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) p gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (h,, Hh) hh
pp: ff ;; hh =
transportb (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
  (gg ;; hh)
q:= transportb_transpose_left
  (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp Hhh): transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))
  (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) = id_disp yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right f)
  (ff ;; id_disp yy) =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) p gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (h,, Hh) hh
pp: ff ;; hh =
transportb (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
  (gg ;; hh)
q:= transportb_transpose_left
  (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp Hhh): transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))
  (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) = id_disp yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right f)
  (ff ;; id_disp yy) = ?b

p: f = g

zz: D z

gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz

pp: ff ;; hh =
transportb (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
  (gg ;; hh)
q:= transportb_transpose_left
  (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp Hhh): transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))
  (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) = id_disp yy
id_disp yy = ?t2

      exact (!q).
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (h,, Hh) hh
pp: ff ;; hh =
transportb (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
  (gg ;; hh)
q:= transportb_transpose_left
  (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp Hhh): transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))
  (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) = id_disp yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right f)
  (ff ;; transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
           (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))
           (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh)) =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) p gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (h,, Hh) hh
pp: ff ;; hh =
transportb (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
  (gg ;; hh)
q:= transportb_transpose_left
  (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp Hhh): transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))
  (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) = id_disp yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right f)
  (ff ;; transportf (mor_disp yy yy)
           (! (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh)))
           (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! p) gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (h,, Hh) hh
pp: ff ;; hh =
transportb (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
  (gg ;; hh)
q:= transportb_transpose_left
  (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp Hhh): transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))
  (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) = id_disp yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (maponpaths (compose f)
        (! (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))))
     (ff ;; (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh))) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! p) gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (h,, Hh) hh
pp: ff ;; hh =
transportb (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
  (gg ;; hh)
q:= transportb_transpose_left
  (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp Hhh): transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))
  (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) = id_disp yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (maponpaths (compose f)
     (! (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))) @
   id_right f)
  (ff ;; (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! p) gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (h,, Hh) hh
pp: ff ;; hh =
transportb (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
  (gg ;; hh)
q:= transportb_transpose_left
  (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp Hhh): transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))
  (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) = id_disp yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (maponpaths (compose f)
     (! (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))) @
   id_right f)
  (transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
     (assoc f (h,, Hh) (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh)))
     (ff ;; hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! p) gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

p: f = g

zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (h,, Hh) hh
pp: ff ;; hh =
transportb (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
  (gg ;; hh)
q:= transportb_transpose_left
  (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp Hhh): transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))
  (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) = id_disp yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (maponpaths (compose f)
     (! (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))) @
   id_right f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (! assoc f (h,, Hh) (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh)))
     (ff ;; hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! p) gg

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (h,, Hh) hh
pp: ff ;; hh =
transportb (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
  (gg ;; hh)
q:= transportb_transpose_left
  (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp Hhh): transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))
  (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) = id_disp yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! assoc f (h,, Hh) (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh)) @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (! (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))) @
   id_right f)
  (ff ;; hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) = ?b

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (h,, Hh) hh
pp: ff ;; hh =
transportb (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
  (gg ;; hh)
q:= transportb_transpose_left
  (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp Hhh): transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))
  (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) = id_disp yy
ff ;; hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh = ?t2

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (h,, Hh) hh
pp: ff ;; hh =
transportb (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
  (gg ;; hh)
q:= transportb_transpose_left
  (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp Hhh): transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))
  (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) = id_disp yy
ff ;; hh = ?y'

      exact pp.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (h,, Hh) hh
pp: ff ;; hh =
transportb (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
  (gg ;; hh)
q:= transportb_transpose_left
  (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp Hhh): transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))
  (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) = id_disp yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! assoc f (h,, Hh) (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh)) @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (! (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))) @
   id_right f)
  (transportb (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
     (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
     (gg ;; hh) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! p) gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (h,, Hh) hh
pp: ff ;; hh =
transportb (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
  (gg ;; hh)
q:= transportb_transpose_left
  (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp Hhh): transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))
  (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) = id_disp yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! assoc f (h,, Hh) (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh)) @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (! (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))) @
   id_right f)
  (transportf (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
     (! maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
     (gg ;; hh) ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! p) gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (h,, Hh) hh
pp: ff ;; hh =
transportb (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
  (gg ;; hh)
q:= transportb_transpose_left
  (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp Hhh): transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))
  (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) = id_disp yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! assoc f (h,, Hh) (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh)) @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (! (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))) @
   id_right f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (cancel_postcomposition (g · h) (f · (h,, Hh))
        (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh))
        (! maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p))
     (gg ;; hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! p) gg

pp: ff ;; hh =
transportb (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
  (gg ;; hh)
q:= transportb_transpose_left
  (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp Hhh): transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))
  (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) = id_disp yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (g · h) (f · (h,, Hh))
     (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh))
     (! maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p) @
   ! assoc f (h,, Hh) (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh)) @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (! (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))) @
   id_right f)
  (gg ;; hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! p) gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (h,, Hh) hh
pp: ff ;; hh =
transportb (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
  (gg ;; hh)
q:= transportb_transpose_left
  (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp Hhh): transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))
  (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) = id_disp yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (cancel_postcomposition (g · h) (f · (h,, Hh))
     (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh))
     (! maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p) @
   ! assoc f (h,, Hh) (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh)) @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (! (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))) @
   id_right f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (assoc g h (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh)))
     (gg ;; (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh))) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! p) gg

D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

p: f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (h,, Hh) hh

transportb (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
  (gg ;; hh)
q:= transportb_transpose_left
  (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp Hhh): transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))
  (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) = id_disp yy
?b = transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! p) gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (h,, Hh) hh
pp: ff ;; hh =
transportb (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
  (gg ;; hh)
q:= transportb_transpose_left
  (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp Hhh): transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))
  (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) = id_disp yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (assoc g h (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (g · h) (f · (h,, Hh))
     (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh))
     (! maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p) @
   ! assoc f (h,, Hh) (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh)) @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (! (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))) @
   id_right f)

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (h,, Hh) hh
pp: ff ;; hh =
transportb (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
  (gg ;; hh)
q:= transportb_transpose_left
  (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp Hhh): transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))
  (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) = id_disp yy
hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh = ?t2

      exact (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp Hhh).
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (h,, Hh) hh
pp: ff ;; hh =
transportb (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
  (gg ;; hh)
q:= transportb_transpose_left
  (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp Hhh): transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))
  (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) = id_disp yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (assoc g h (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (g · h) (f · (h,, Hh))
     (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh))
     (! maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p) @
   ! assoc f (h,, Hh) (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh)) @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (! (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))) @
   id_right f)
  (gg ;; transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
           (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))
           (id_disp yy)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! p) gg

D: disp_cat C

  (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
  (gg ;; hh)
q:= transportb_transpose_left
  (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp Hhh): transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))
  (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) = id_disp yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (assoc g h (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (g · h) (f · (h,, Hh))
     (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh))
     (! maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p) @
   ! assoc f (h,, Hh) (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh)) @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (! (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))) @
   id_right f)
  (gg ;; transportf (mor_disp yy yy)
           (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (h,, Hh) hh
pp: ff ;; hh =
transportb (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
  (gg ;; hh)
q:= transportb_transpose_left
  (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp Hhh): transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))
  (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) = id_disp yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (assoc g h (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (g · h) (f · (h,, Hh))
     (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh))
     (! maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p) @
   ! assoc f (h,, Hh) (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh)) @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (! (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))) @
   id_right f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (maponpaths (compose g)
        (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh)))
     (gg ;; id_disp yy)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! p) gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (h,, Hh) hh
pp: ff ;; hh =
transportb (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
  (gg ;; hh)
q:= transportb_transpose_left
  (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp Hhh): transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))
  (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) = id_disp yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (assoc g h (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (g · h) (f · (h,, Hh))
     (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh))
     (! maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p) @
   ! assoc f (h,, Hh) (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh)) @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (! (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))) @
   id_right f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (maponpaths (compose g)
        (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh)))
     (transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right g) gg)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! p) gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (h,, Hh) hh
pp: ff ;; hh =
transportb (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
  (gg ;; hh)
q:= transportb_transpose_left
  (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp Hhh): transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))
  (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) = id_disp yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (assoc g h (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (g · h) (f · (h,, Hh))
     (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh))
     (! maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p) @
   ! assoc f (h,, Hh) (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh)) @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (! (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))) @
   id_right f)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
     (maponpaths (compose g)
        (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh)))
     (transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! id_right g) gg)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! p) gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (h,, Hh) hh
pp: ff ;; hh =
transportb (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
  (gg ;; hh)
q:= transportb_transpose_left
  (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp Hhh): transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))
  (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) = id_disp yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy)
  (! id_right g @
   maponpaths (compose g)
     (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh)) @
   assoc g h (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh)) @
   cancel_postcomposition (g · h) (f · (h,, Hh))
     (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh))
     (! maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p) @
   ! assoc f (h,, Hh) (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh)) @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (! (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))) @
   id_right f) gg =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (! p) gg

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hh: is_z_isomorphism h
p: f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
Hhh: is_z_iso_disp (h,, Hh) hh
pp: ff ;; hh =
transportb (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, z ⟧, xx -->[ z0] zz)
  (maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p)
  (gg ;; hh)
q:= transportb_transpose_left
  (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp Hhh): transportb (mor_disp yy yy)
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))
  (hh ;; inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hhh) = id_disp yy
! id_right g @
maponpaths (compose g)
  (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh)) @
assoc g h (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh)) @
cancel_postcomposition (g · h) (f · (h,, Hh))
  (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh))
  (! maponpaths (λ z0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, z0 · h) p) @
! assoc f (h,, Hh) (inv_from_z_iso (h,, Hh)) @
maponpaths (compose f)
  (! (! z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (h,, Hh))) @ id_right f =
! p

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.
End Utilities.

(** Lemmas for `idtoiso_disp` *)

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx₁, xx₂: D x
p: xx₁ = xx₂
(z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) p)
 :
 xx₂ -->[
 z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath x))] xx₁) =
idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (! p)


C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx₁, xx₂: D x
p: xx₁ = xx₂
(z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) p)
 :
 xx₂ -->[
 z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (idpath x))] xx₁) =
idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (! p)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx₁: D x
z_iso_inv_from_z_iso_disp
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (idpath xx₁)) =
idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (! idpath xx₁)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx₁: D x
id_disp xx₁ = id_disp xx₁

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx₁, xx₂, xx₃: D x
p: xx₁ = xx₂
q: xx₂ = xx₃
idtoiso_disp (idpath x) p ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath x) q =
transportb (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx₁ -->[ z] xx₃)
  (id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (p @ q))


C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx₁, xx₂, xx₃: D x
p: xx₁ = xx₂
q: xx₂ = xx₃
idtoiso_disp (idpath x) p ;; idtoiso_disp (idpath x) q =
transportb (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx₁ -->[ z] xx₃)
  (id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (p @ q))

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx₁: D x
idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (idpath xx₁) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                          (idpath x)
                                          (idpath xx₁) =
transportb (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx₁ -->[ z] xx₁)
  (id_left (idtoiso (idpath x)))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x) (idpath xx₁ @ idpath xx₁))

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx₁: D x
id_disp xx₁ ;; id_disp xx₁ =
transportb (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx₁ -->[ z] xx₁)
  (id_left (identity x)) (id_disp xx₁)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x: C
xx₁: D x
transportb (mor_disp xx₁ xx₁) (id_left (identity x))
  (id_disp xx₁) =
transportb (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, xx₁ -->[ z] xx₁)
  (id_left (identity x)) (id_disp xx₁)

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C
xx₁: D x₁
xx₂: D x₂
xx₃: D x₃
p: x₁ = x₂
q: x₂ = x₃
pp: transportf D p xx₁ = xx₂
qq: transportf D q xx₂ = xx₃
transportf D (p @ q) xx₁ = xx₃


C: category
D: disp_cat C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C
xx₁: D x₁
xx₂: D x₂
xx₃: D x₃
p: x₁ = x₂
q: x₂ = x₃
pp: transportf D p xx₁ = xx₂
qq: transportf D q xx₂ = xx₃
transportf D (p @ q) xx₁ = xx₃

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C
xx₁: D x₁
xx₂: D x₂
xx₃: D x₃
p: x₁ = x₂
q: x₂ = x₃
pp: transportf D p xx₁ = xx₂
qq: transportf D q xx₂ = xx₃
transportf D q (transportf D p xx₁) = xx₃

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C
xx₁: D x₁
xx₂: D x₂
xx₃: D x₃
p: x₁ = x₂
q: x₂ = x₃
pp: transportf D p xx₁ = xx₂
qq: transportf D q xx₂ = xx₃
transportf D q (transportf D p xx₁) =
transportf D q xx₂

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C
xx₁: D x₁
xx₂: D x₂
xx₃: D x₃
p: x₁ = x₂
q: x₂ = x₃
pp: transportf D p xx₁ = xx₂
qq: transportf D q xx₂ = xx₃
transportf D p xx₁ = xx₂

  exact pp.
Defined.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C
xx₁: D x₁
xx₂: D x₂
xx₃: D x₃
p: x₁ = x₂
q: x₂ = x₃
pp: transportf D p xx₁ = xx₂
qq: transportf D q xx₂ = xx₃
idtoiso_disp p pp ;; idtoiso_disp q qq =
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧, xx₁ -->[ z] xx₃)
  (pr1_idtoiso_concat p q)
  (idtoiso_disp (p @ q)
     (idtoiso_disp_comp'_path pp qq))


C: category
D: disp_cat C
x₁, x₂, x₃: C
xx₁: D x₁
xx₂: D x₂
xx₃: D x₃
p: x₁ = x₂
q: x₂ = x₃
pp: transportf D p xx₁ = xx₂
qq: transportf D q xx₂ = xx₃
idtoiso_disp p pp ;; idtoiso_disp q qq =
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧, xx₁ -->[ z] xx₃)
  (pr1_idtoiso_concat p q)
  (idtoiso_disp (p @ q)
     (idtoiso_disp_comp'_path pp qq))

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x₁: C
xx₁, xx₂, xx₃: D x₁
pp: transportf D (idpath x₁) xx₁ = xx₂
qq: transportf D (idpath x₁) xx₂ = xx₃
idtoiso_disp (idpath x₁) pp ;; idtoiso_disp
                                 (idpath x₁) qq =
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x₁, x₁ ⟧, xx₁ -->[ z] xx₃)
  (pr1_idtoiso_concat (idpath x₁) (idpath x₁))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x₁ @ idpath x₁)
     (idtoiso_disp_comp'_path pp qq))

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x₁: C
xx₁, xx₂, xx₃: D x₁
pp: xx₁ = xx₂
qq: xx₂ = xx₃
idtoiso_disp (idpath x₁) pp ;; idtoiso_disp
                                 (idpath x₁) qq =
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x₁, x₁ ⟧, xx₁ -->[ z] xx₃)
  (pr1_idtoiso_concat (idpath x₁) (idpath x₁))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x₁ @ idpath x₁)
     (idtoiso_disp_comp'_path pp qq))

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x₁: C
xx₁: D x₁
idtoiso_disp (idpath x₁) (idpath xx₁) ;; idtoiso_disp
                                           (idpath x₁)
                                           (idpath xx₁) =
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x₁, x₁ ⟧, xx₁ -->[ z] xx₁)
  (pr1_idtoiso_concat (idpath x₁) (idpath x₁))
  (idtoiso_disp (idpath x₁ @ idpath x₁)
     (idtoiso_disp_comp'_path (idpath xx₁)
        (idpath xx₁)))

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x₁: C
xx₁: D x₁
id_disp xx₁ ;; id_disp xx₁ =
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x₁, x₁ ⟧, xx₁ -->[ z] xx₁)
  (pr1_idtoiso_concat (idpath x₁) (idpath x₁))
  (id_disp xx₁)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x₁: C
xx₁: D x₁
transportb (mor_disp xx₁ xx₁) (id_left (identity x₁))
  (id_disp xx₁) =
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x₁, x₁ ⟧, xx₁ -->[ z] xx₁)
  (pr1_idtoiso_concat (idpath x₁) (idpath x₁))
  (id_disp xx₁)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x₁: C
xx₁: D x₁
transportf (mor_disp xx₁ xx₁)
  (! id_left (identity x₁)) (id_disp xx₁) =
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x₁, x₁ ⟧, xx₁ -->[ z] xx₁)
  (pr1_idtoiso_concat (idpath x₁) (idpath x₁))
  (id_disp xx₁)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x₁: C
xx₁: D x₁
! id_left (identity x₁) =
pr1_idtoiso_concat (idpath x₁) (idpath x₁)

  apply homset_property.
Qed.

(**
 Displayed isomorphisms are closed under transporting
 *)

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
p: pr1 f = pr1 g
Hff: is_z_iso_disp f ff
is_z_iso_disp g
  (transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy) p ff)


C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
p: pr1 f = pr1 g
Hff: is_z_iso_disp f ff
is_z_iso_disp g
  (transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy) p ff)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
p: pr1 f = pr1 g
Hff: is_z_iso_disp f ff
yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso g] xx
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
p: pr1 f = pr1 g
Hff: is_z_iso_disp f ff
?pr1 ;; transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy) p
          ff =
transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 g) (id_disp yy)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
p: pr1 f = pr1 g
Hff: is_z_iso_disp f ff
(λ _ : ?pr1 ;; transportf
                 (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy) p
                 ff =
       transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 g)
         (id_disp yy),
 transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy) p ff ;; 
 ?pr1 =
 transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 g) (id_disp xx))
  ?pr10

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
p: pr1 f = pr1 g
Hff: is_z_iso_disp f ff
yy -->[ inv_from_z_iso g] xx
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
p: pr1 f = pr1 g
Hff: is_z_iso_disp f ff
inv_from_z_iso f = inv_from_z_iso g

    abstract
      (induction f as [ f Hf ] ;
       induction g as [ g Hg ] ;
       cbn in * ;
       induction p ;
       do 2 apply maponpaths ;
       apply isaprop_is_z_isomorphism).
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
p: pr1 f = pr1 g
Hff: is_z_iso_disp f ff
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, yy -->[ z] xx)
  (is_z_iso_disp_transportf_fun_eq_subproof C D x y f
     g xx yy ff p Hff) (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hff) ;; 
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy) p ff =
transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 g) (id_disp yy)
 abstract
      (induction f as [ f Hf ] ;
       induction g as [ g Hg ] ;
       cbn in * ;
       induction p ;
       cbn ;
       rewrite mor_disp_transportf_postwhisker ;
       refine (maponpaths _ (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor Hff) @ _) ;
       unfold transportb ;
       rewrite transport_f_f ;
       apply maponpaths_2 ;
       apply homset_property).
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
p: pr1 f = pr1 g
Hff: is_z_iso_disp f ff
(λ _ : transportf (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, yy -->[ z] xx)
         (is_z_iso_disp_transportf_fun_eq_subproof C D
            x y f g xx yy ff p Hff)
         (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hff) ;; transportf
                                            (λ z : 
                                                C ⟦ x,
                                                y ⟧,
                                             xx -->[
                                             z] yy) p
                                            ff =
       transportb (mor_disp yy yy) (pr2 g)
         (id_disp yy),
 transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy) p ff ;; 
 transportf (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, yy -->[ z] xx)
   (is_z_iso_disp_transportf_fun_eq_subproof C D x y f
      g xx yy ff p Hff) (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hff) =
 transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 g) (id_disp xx))
  (is_z_iso_disp_transportf_fun_eq_subproof0 C D x y f
     g xx yy ff p Hff)
 abstract
      (induction f as [ f Hf ] ;
       induction g as [ g Hg ] ;
       cbn in * ;
       induction p ;
       cbn ;
       rewrite mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker ;
       refine (maponpaths _ (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp Hff) @ _) ;
       unfold transportb ;
       rewrite transport_f_f ;
       apply maponpaths_2 ;
       apply homset_property).
Defined.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
p: pr1 g = pr1 f
Hff: is_z_iso_disp f ff
is_z_iso_disp g
  (transportb (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy) p ff)


C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
p: pr1 g = pr1 f
Hff: is_z_iso_disp f ff
is_z_iso_disp g
  (transportb (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy) p ff)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y: C
f, g: z_iso x y
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
p: pr1 g = pr1 f
Hff: is_z_iso_disp f ff
is_z_iso_disp f ff

  exact Hff.
Defined.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (f,, Hf) ff
p: f · g = h
gg =
transportf (mor_disp yy zz)
  (z_iso_inv_on_right x y z (f,, Hf) g h (! p))
  (pr1 Hff ;; hh)
→ ff ;; gg = transportb (mor_disp xx zz) p hh


C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (f,, Hf) ff
p: f · g = h
gg =
transportf (mor_disp yy zz)
  (z_iso_inv_on_right x y z (f,, Hf) g h (! p))
  (pr1 Hff ;; hh)
→ ff ;; gg = transportb (mor_disp xx zz) p hh

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (f,, Hf) ff
p: f · g = h
q: gg =
transportf (mor_disp yy zz)
  (z_iso_inv_on_right x y z (f,, Hf) g h (! p))
  (pr1 Hff ;; hh)
ff ;; gg = transportb (mor_disp xx zz) p hh

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (f,, Hf) ff
p: f · g = h
q: gg =
transportf (mor_disp yy zz)
  (z_iso_inv_on_right x y z (f,, Hf) g h (! p))
  (pr1 Hff ;; hh)
ff ;; transportf (mor_disp yy zz)
        (z_iso_inv_on_right x y z (f,, Hf) g h (! p))
        (pr1 Hff ;; hh) =
transportb (mor_disp xx zz) p hh

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (f,, Hf) ff
p: f · g = h
ff ;; transportf (mor_disp yy zz)
        (z_iso_inv_on_right x y z (f,, Hf) g h (! p))
        (pr1 Hff ;; hh) =
transportb (mor_disp xx zz) p hh

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (f,, Hf) ff
p: f · g = h
transportf (mor_disp xx zz)
  (maponpaths (compose f)
     (z_iso_inv_on_right x y z (f,, Hf) g h (! p)))
  (ff ;; (pr1 Hff ;; hh)) =
transportb (mor_disp xx zz) p hh

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (f,, Hf) ff
p: f · g = h
transportb (mor_disp xx zz) (! p)
  (transportf (mor_disp xx zz)
     (maponpaths (compose f)
        (z_iso_inv_on_right x y z (f,, Hf) g h (! p)))
     (ff ;; (pr1 Hff ;; hh))) = hh

ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (f,, Hf) ff
p: f · g = h
transportf (mor_disp xx zz) (! (! p))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx zz)
     (maponpaths (compose f)
        (z_iso_inv_on_right x y z (f,, Hf) g h (! p)))
     (ff ;; (pr1 Hff ;; hh))) = hh

hh: xx -->[ h] zz

  (maponpaths (compose f)
     (z_iso_inv_on_right x y z (f,, Hf) g h (! p)) @
   ! (! p)) (ff ;; (pr1 Hff ;; hh)) = hh

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (f,, Hf) ff
p: f · g = h
transportf (mor_disp xx zz)
  (maponpaths (compose f)
     (z_iso_inv_on_right x y z (f,, Hf) g h (! p)) @
   ! (! p))
  (transportb (mor_disp xx zz)
     (assoc f (inv_from_z_iso (f,, Hf)) h)
     (ff ;; pr1 Hff ;; hh)) = hh

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

ff ;; pr1 Hff = ?y'

    exact (pr2 (pr2 Hff)).
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (f,, Hf) ff
p: f · g = h
transportf (mor_disp xx zz)
  (! assoc f (inv_from_z_iso (f,, Hf)) h @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (z_iso_inv_on_right x y z (f,, Hf) g h (! p)) @
   ! (! p))
  (transportb (mor_disp xx xx) (pr1 (f,, Hf))
     (id_disp xx) ;; hh) = hh

D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

   maponpaths (compose f)
     (z_iso_inv_on_right x y z (f,, Hf) g h (! p)) @
   ! (! p))

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (f,, Hf) ff
p: f · g = h
transportf (mor_disp xx zz)
  (! assoc f (inv_from_z_iso (f,, Hf)) h @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (z_iso_inv_on_right x y z (f,, Hf) g h (! p)) @
   ! (! p))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx zz)
     (cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
        (f · inv_from_z_iso (f,, Hf)) h
        (! pr1 (f,, Hf))) (id_disp xx ;; hh)) = hh

  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
     (f · inv_from_z_iso (f,, Hf)) h (! pr1 (f,, Hf)) @
   ! assoc f (inv_from_z_iso (f,, Hf)) h @
   maponpaths (compose f)

  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
     (f · inv_from_z_iso (f,, Hf)) h (! pr1 (f,, Hf)) @
   ! assoc f (inv_from_z_iso (f,, Hf)) h @
   maponpaths (compose f)

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (f,, Hf) ff
p: f · g = h
transportf (mor_disp xx zz)
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
     (f · inv_from_z_iso (f,, Hf)) h (! pr1 (f,, Hf)) @
   ! assoc f (inv_from_z_iso (f,, Hf)) h @
   maponpaths (compose f)
     (z_iso_inv_on_right x y z (f,, Hf) g h (! p)) @
   ! (! p)) (id_disp xx ;; hh) = ?b

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (f,, Hf) ff
p: f · g = h
cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
  (f · inv_from_z_iso (f,, Hf)) h (! pr1 (f,, Hf)) @
! assoc f (inv_from_z_iso (f,, Hf)) h @
maponpaths (compose f)
  (z_iso_inv_on_right x y z (f,, Hf) g h (! p)) @
! (! p) = ?y'

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (f,, Hf) ff
p: f · g = h
cancel_postcomposition (identity x)
  (f · inv_from_z_iso (f,, Hf)) h (! pr1 (f,, Hf)) @
! assoc f (inv_from_z_iso (f,, Hf)) h @
maponpaths (compose f)
  (z_iso_inv_on_right x y z (f,, Hf) g h (! p)) @
! (! p) = id_left h

    apply homset_property.
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
Hff: is_z_iso_disp (f,, Hf) ff
p: f · g = h
transportf (mor_disp xx zz) (id_left h)
  (id_disp xx ;; hh) = hh

  apply pathsinv0, id_left_disp_var.
Qed.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
Hgg: is_z_iso_disp (g,, Hg) gg
p: f · g = h
ff =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (z_iso_inv_on_left x y z f (g,, Hg) h (! p))
  (hh ;; pr1 Hgg)
→ ff ;; gg = transportb (mor_disp xx zz) p hh

  (z_iso_inv_on_left x y z f (g,, Hg) h (! p))
  (hh ;; pr1 Hgg)
→ ff ;; gg = transportb (mor_disp xx zz) p hh

ff ;; gg = transportb (mor_disp xx zz) p hh

transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (z_iso_inv_on_left x y z f (g,, Hg) h (! p))
  (hh ;; pr1 Hgg)
transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (z_iso_inv_on_left x y z f (g,, Hg) h (! p))
  (hh ;; pr1 Hgg) ;; gg =
transportb (mor_disp xx zz) p hh

C: category

x, y, z: C

  (hh ;; pr1 Hgg ;; gg) =

     (! z_iso_inv_on_left x y z f (g,, Hg) h (! p)) @
   ! (! p))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx zz)
     (assoc h (inv_from_z_iso (g,, Hg)) g)
     (hh ;; (pr1 Hgg ;; gg))) = hh

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
Hgg: is_z_iso_disp (g,, Hg) gg
p: f · g = h
transportf (mor_disp xx zz)
  (assoc h (inv_from_z_iso (g,, Hg)) g @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (h · inv_from_z_iso (g,, Hg)) f g
     (! z_iso_inv_on_left x y z f (g,, Hg) h (! p)) @
   ! (! p)) (hh ;; (pr1 Hgg ;; gg)) = hh

D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
Hgg: is_z_iso_disp (g,, Hg) gg
p: f · g = h
transportf (mor_disp xx zz)
  (assoc h (inv_from_z_iso (g,, Hg)) g @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (h · inv_from_z_iso (g,, Hg)) f g
     (! z_iso_inv_on_left x y z f (g,, Hg) h (! p)) @
   ! (! p)) (hh ;; (pr1 Hgg ;; gg)) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz

p: f · g = h
?b = hh

D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧

xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
Hgg: is_z_iso_disp (g,, Hg) gg
p: f · g = h
transportf (mor_disp xx zz)
  (assoc h (inv_from_z_iso (g,, Hg)) g @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (h · inv_from_z_iso (g,, Hg)) f g

C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
Hgg: is_z_iso_disp (g,, Hg) gg
p: f · g = h
pr1 Hgg ;; gg = ?t2

    exact (pr1 (pr2 Hgg)).
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
Hgg: is_z_iso_disp (g,, Hg) gg
p: f · g = h
transportf (mor_disp xx zz)
  (assoc h (inv_from_z_iso (g,, Hg)) g @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (h · inv_from_z_iso (g,, Hg)) f g
     (! z_iso_inv_on_left x y z f (g,, Hg) h (! p)) @
   ! (! p))
  (hh ;; transportb (mor_disp zz zz) (pr2 (g,, Hg))
           (id_disp zz)) = hh

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
Hgg: is_z_iso_disp (g,, Hg) gg
p: f · g = h
transportf (mor_disp xx zz)
  (assoc h (inv_from_z_iso (g,, Hg)) g @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (h · inv_from_z_iso (g,, Hg)) f g
     (! z_iso_inv_on_left x y z f (g,, Hg) h (! p)) @
   ! (! p))
  (hh ;; transportf (mor_disp zz zz) (! pr2 (g,, Hg))
           (id_disp zz)) = hh

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
Hgg: is_z_iso_disp (g,, Hg) gg
p: f · g = h
transportf (mor_disp xx zz)
  (assoc h (inv_from_z_iso (g,, Hg)) g @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (h · inv_from_z_iso (g,, Hg)) f g
     (! z_iso_inv_on_left x y z f (g,, Hg) h (! p)) @
   ! (! p))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx zz)
     (maponpaths (compose h) (! pr2 (g,, Hg)))
     (hh ;; id_disp zz)) = hh

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧

xx: D x
yy: D y

ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
Hgg: is_z_iso_disp (g,, Hg) gg
p: f · g = h
transportf (mor_disp xx zz)
  (maponpaths (compose h) (! pr2 (g,, Hg)) @
   assoc h (inv_from_z_iso (g,, Hg)) g @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (h · inv_from_z_iso (g,, Hg)) f g
     (! z_iso_inv_on_left x y z f (g,, Hg) h (! p)) @
   ! (! p)) (hh ;; id_disp zz) = hh


  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
Hgg: is_z_iso_disp (g,, Hg) gg
p: f · g = h
transportf (mor_disp xx zz)
  (maponpaths (compose h) (! pr2 (g,, Hg)) @
   assoc h (inv_from_z_iso (g,, Hg)) g @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (h · inv_from_z_iso (g,, Hg)) f g
     (! z_iso_inv_on_left x y z f (g,, Hg) h (! p)) @
   ! (! p)) (hh ;; id_disp zz) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
Hgg: is_z_iso_disp (g,, Hg) gg
p: f · g = h
?b = hh
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
Hgg: is_z_iso_disp (g,, Hg) gg
p: f · g = h
transportf (mor_disp xx zz)
  (maponpaths (compose h) (! pr2 (g,, Hg)) @
   assoc h (inv_from_z_iso (g,, Hg)) g @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (h · inv_from_z_iso (g,, Hg)) f g
     (! z_iso_inv_on_left x y z f (g,, Hg) h (! p)) @
   ! (! p)) (hh ;; id_disp zz) = ?b

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
Hgg: is_z_iso_disp (g,, Hg) gg
p: f · g = h
maponpaths (compose h) (! pr2 (g,, Hg)) @
assoc h (inv_from_z_iso (g,, Hg)) g @
cancel_postcomposition (h · inv_from_z_iso (g,, Hg)) f
  g (! z_iso_inv_on_left x y z f (g,, Hg) h (! p)) @
! (! p) = ?y'

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
Hgg: is_z_iso_disp (g,, Hg) gg
p: f · g = h
maponpaths (compose h) (! pr2 (g,, Hg)) @
assoc h (inv_from_z_iso (g,, Hg)) g @
cancel_postcomposition (h · inv_from_z_iso (g,, Hg)) f
  g (! z_iso_inv_on_left x y z f (g,, Hg) h (! p)) @
! (! p) = id_right h

    apply homset_property.
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, z ⟧
Hg: is_z_isomorphism g
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: xx -->[ h] zz
Hgg: is_z_iso_disp (g,, Hg) gg
p: f · g = h
transportf (mor_disp xx zz) (id_right h)
  (hh ;; id_disp zz) = hh

  apply pathsinv0, id_right_disp_var.
Qed.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff1, ff2: yy -->[ f] zz
id_disp yy ;; ff1 = id_disp yy ;; ff2 → ff1 = ff2


C: category
D: disp_cat C
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff1, ff2: yy -->[ f] zz
id_disp yy ;; ff1 = id_disp yy ;; ff2 → ff1 = ff2

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff1, ff2: yy -->[ f] zz
p: id_disp yy ;; ff1 = id_disp yy ;; ff2
ff1 = ff2

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff1, ff2: yy -->[ f] zz
p: transportb (mor_disp yy zz) (id_left f) ff1 =
transportb (mor_disp yy zz) (id_left f) ff2
ff1 = ff2

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff1, ff2: yy -->[ f] zz
p: transportb (mor_disp yy zz) (id_left f) ff1 =
transportb (mor_disp yy zz) (id_left f) ff2
transportb (mor_disp yy zz) (! id_left f)
  (transportb (mor_disp yy zz) (id_left f) ff2) = ff2

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff1, ff2: yy -->[ f] zz
p: transportb (mor_disp yy zz) (id_left f) ff1 =
transportb (mor_disp yy zz) (id_left f) ff2
transportb (mor_disp yy zz) (! id_left f @ id_left f)
  ff2 = ff2

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff1, ff2: yy -->[ f] zz
p: transportb (mor_disp yy zz) (id_left f) ff1 =
transportb (mor_disp yy zz) (id_left f) ff2
isaset (C ⟦ y, z ⟧)

  apply homset_property.
Qed.
